offset_stage_label: Following the arrows around the cycle, what stage is {step_count} {step_noun} {query_relationship} "{query_stage_label}"?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:offset_stage_label.object_description: a directed cycle with labeled stages connected by arrows
query:offset_stage_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible stage label reached after following the prompt
query:offset_stage_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the correct stage box
